427556.name: pop_nonelectdem_fh
427556.description: The variable identifies the number of people living in non-democracies, based on Freedom House's Freedom in the World.

source.name: Political regimes - Freedom House (2022)
source.dataPublishedBy: Freedom House (2022). Freedom in the World.
source.additionalInfo:
This dataset provides information on political regimes, using data from Freedom House's Freedom in the World (2022)

You can download the code and complete dataset, including supplementary variables, from GitHub: https://github.com/owid/notebooks/tree/main/BastianHerre/political_regimes

427557.name: pop_electdem_fh
427557.description: The variable identifies the number of people living in electoral democracies, based on Freedom House's Freedom in the World.

427558.name: pop_missdem_fh
427558.description: The variable identifies the number of people living in countries without democracy data, based on Freedom House's Freedom in the World.
